ActionConfig.description:
Actualization and action-set parameters.

Advanced ecological runs default to utility-weighted stochastic actualization.
Deterministic argmax remains available by setting ``stochastic=False`` for
controlled tests, but the ordinary MVP/advanced configuration now samples
from normalized survival-weighted action probabilities.
ActionConfig.title: ActionConfig

ActionTransitionConfig.description:
Versioned completion contract for SENSE, FLEE, and PURSUE.

The default is the certified v0.9.9 recovery sector.  No legacy run gains
new observations, arrays, costs, masks, or transitions unless ``enabled``
and the v1 contract are selected explicitly.
ActionTransitionConfig.title: ActionTransitionConfig

CADCRecordingConfig.description:
Additive factual evidence recorder configuration.

The CADC recorder is observational and disabled by default.  Its limits
are validated before any device or host buffer is allocated so an exact
profile cannot silently degrade to sampled evidence.
CADCRecordingConfig.title: CADCRecordingConfig

CommunicationConfig.description:
Universal communication-channel parameters.

Every observer window can signal. These coefficients define the physical
channel substrate, not a dedicated signaler species.
CommunicationConfig.title: CommunicationConfig

CounterfactualConfig.description:
Bounded Phase 3 counterfactual rollout configuration.

The default is inert so loading an historical configuration cannot create
a source observer, allocate branch state, or change factual execution.
Active execution is intentionally limited to the certified segmented,
single-device action-transition contract.
CounterfactualConfig.title: CounterfactualConfig

CrossScaleHomeostasisConfig.description: Patch/apex responsiveness to lower-level viability and carrying pressure.
CrossScaleHomeostasisConfig.title: CrossScaleHomeostasisConfig

DecisionHomeostasisConfig.description:
Survival-weighted stochastic decision policy coefficients.

This layer keeps action selection stochastic, but raises precision and
optimal-action mass under homeostatic urgency while respecting authority.
DecisionHomeostasisConfig.title: DecisionHomeostasisConfig

DirectionScoreWeights.description: Explicit coefficients for a high-level movement compiler.
DirectionScoreWeights.title: DirectionScoreWeights

EcologyConfig.description:
Advanced ecological dynamics coefficients.

Disabled by default to preserve the Pass 14 recovery sector. When enabled,
feeding uses Monod saturation, digested mass enters a resource buffer, waste
can recycle into food, and toxin/starvation damage are nonlinear.
EcologyConfig.title: EcologyConfig

InitializationConfig.description:
Initial-condition parameters for deterministic world construction.

These values are deliberately separated from runtime engine coefficients.
Later experiments can alter starting conditions without changing the update
equations.
InitializationConfig.title: InitializationConfig

IntegrationConfig.description: Coefficients for the bounded observer-window integration functional.
IntegrationConfig.title: IntegrationConfig

RAQICConfig.description:
Configuration for the RAQIC decision substrate.

Disabled by default so legacy OWL remains the recovery path. When enabled
with ``decision_policy='raqic'``, RAQIC replaces the probability/readout
decision substrate while OWL still applies physical consequences.

full_gpu_qiskit_allow_cpu_fallback.title: Full Gpu Qiskit Allow Cpu Fallback

full_gpu_visual_max_slowdown_fraction.title: Full Gpu Visual Max Slowdown Fraction

RAQICConfig.title: RAQICConfig

ResourceConfig.description: Physical resource, food, toxin, and metabolic parameters.
ResourceConfig.title: ResourceConfig

WorldConfig.description: Spatial and scheduling parameters for the simulated world.
WorldConfig.title: WorldConfig

description: Top-level validated configuration for a simulation run.
title: SimulationConfig
